step_completed.description: The number of the step just generated

narrative_text.description: The narrative text of the step: 2–4 evocative sentences that fulfil the dramatic function of the stage

caption.description: A very short sentence (max 8 words) displayed on the installation as a subtitle for the step

primary_color.description: Dominant color of the image as hexadecimal (e.g. '#1A237E')

secondary_color.description: Secondary color of the image as hexadecimal (e.g. '#FFD700')

image_prompt.description: Detailed prompt for an AI image generator: explicitly names the primary/secondary colors, describes composition and atmosphere, specifies a visual style

vote_question.description: Question shown to the audience to vote on the next step. Null if this is the last step.

option_a.description: First vote option. Null if this is the last step.

option_b.description: Second vote option. Null if this is the last step.

next_interaction_type.description: Type of audience interaction required for the next step. IDLE for the last step.
